infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Jasiri needs camera access to capture customer ID and passport photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Jasiri uses your location to tag customer home and work addresses for field verification.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Jasiri uses Face ID to securely authenticate you as a Relationship Officer.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Jasiri to authenticate you using Face ID.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Jasiri to use your location to tag customer addresses.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Jasiri to access photos for document upload.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Jasiri to access the camera for customer ID photos.
